ggsegDKT 2.0.0
  • Reference

Desikan-Killiany-Tourville Cortical Atlas

Source: R/data.R
dkt.Rd

Cortical parcellation with 32 regions per hemisphere based on the Desikan-Killiany-Tourville labeling protocol. Contains both 2D polygon geometry for [ggseg::geom_brain()] and 3D vertex indices for [ggseg3d::ggseg3d()].

dkt()

Value

A [ggseg.formats::ggseg_atlas] object (cortical).

References

Klein A, Tourville J (2012). 101 labeled brain images and a consistent human cortical labeling protocol. *Frontiers in Neuroscience*, 6:171. doi:10.3389/fnins.2012.00171

Examples

dkt()
#> 
#> ── dkt ggseg atlas ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#> Type: cortical
#> Regions: 32
#> Hemispheres: left, right
#> Views: inferior, lateral, medial, superior
#> Palette: ✔
#> Rendering: ✔ ggseg
#> ✔ ggseg3d (vertices)
#> ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
#> # A tibble: 64 × 3
#>    hemi  region                   label                      
#>    <chr> <chr>                    <chr>                      
#>  1 left  caudalanteriorcingulate  lh_caudalanteriorcingulate 
#>  2 left  caudalmiddlefrontal      lh_caudalmiddlefrontal     
#>  3 left  cuneus                   lh_cuneus                  
#>  4 left  entorhinal               lh_entorhinal              
#>  5 left  fusiform                 lh_fusiform                
#>  6 left  inferiorparietal         lh_inferiorparietal        
#>  7 left  inferiortemporal         lh_inferiortemporal        
#>  8 left  isthmuscingulate         lh_isthmuscingulate        
#>  9 left  lateraloccipital         lh_lateraloccipital        
#> 10 left  lateralorbitofrontal     lh_lateralorbitofrontal    
#> 11 left  lingual                  lh_lingual                 
#> 12 left  medialorbitofrontal      lh_medialorbitofrontal     
#> 13 left  middletemporal           lh_middletemporal          
#> 14 left  parahippocampal          lh_parahippocampal         
#> 15 left  paracentral              lh_paracentral             
#> 16 left  parsopercularis          lh_parsopercularis         
#> 17 left  parsorbitalis            lh_parsorbitalis           
#> 18 left  parstriangularis         lh_parstriangularis        
#> 19 left  pericalcarine            lh_pericalcarine           
#> 20 left  postcentral              lh_postcentral             
#> 21 left  posteriorcingulate       lh_posteriorcingulate      
#> 22 left  precentral               lh_precentral              
#> 23 left  precuneus                lh_precuneus               
#> 24 left  rostralanteriorcingulate lh_rostralanteriorcingulate
#> 25 left  rostralmiddlefrontal     lh_rostralmiddlefrontal    
#> 26 left  superiorfrontal          lh_superiorfrontal         
#> 27 left  superiorparietal         lh_superiorparietal        
#> 28 left  superiortemporal         lh_superiortemporal        
#> 29 left  supramarginal            lh_supramarginal           
#> 30 left  transversetemporal       lh_transversetemporal      
#> 31 left  insula                   lh_insula                  
#> 32 left  unknown                  lh_unknown                 
#> 33 right caudalanteriorcingulate  rh_caudalanteriorcingulate 
#> 34 right caudalmiddlefrontal      rh_caudalmiddlefrontal     
#> 35 right cuneus                   rh_cuneus                  
#> 36 right entorhinal               rh_entorhinal              
#> 37 right fusiform                 rh_fusiform                
#> 38 right inferiorparietal         rh_inferiorparietal        
#> 39 right inferiortemporal         rh_inferiortemporal        
#> 40 right isthmuscingulate         rh_isthmuscingulate        
#> 41 right lateraloccipital         rh_lateraloccipital        
#> 42 right lateralorbitofrontal     rh_lateralorbitofrontal    
#> 43 right lingual                  rh_lingual                 
#> 44 right medialorbitofrontal      rh_medialorbitofrontal     
#> 45 right middletemporal           rh_middletemporal          
#> 46 right parahippocampal          rh_parahippocampal         
#> 47 right paracentral              rh_paracentral             
#> 48 right parsopercularis          rh_parsopercularis         
#> 49 right parsorbitalis            rh_parsorbitalis           
#> 50 right parstriangularis         rh_parstriangularis        
#> 51 right pericalcarine            rh_pericalcarine           
#> 52 right postcentral              rh_postcentral             
#> 53 right posteriorcingulate       rh_posteriorcingulate      
#> 54 right precentral               rh_precentral              
#> 55 right precuneus                rh_precuneus               
#> 56 right rostralanteriorcingulate rh_rostralanteriorcingulate
#> 57 right rostralmiddlefrontal     rh_rostralmiddlefrontal    
#> 58 right superiorfrontal          rh_superiorfrontal         
#> 59 right superiorparietal         rh_superiorparietal        
#> 60 right superiortemporal         rh_superiortemporal        
#> 61 right supramarginal            rh_supramarginal           
#> 62 right transversetemporal       rh_transversetemporal      
#> 63 right insula                   rh_insula                  
#> 64 right unknown                  rh_unknown
